description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named clang that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. The workflow should have four jobs: build-clang-9-linux, build-clang-9-linux-no-stl, build-clang-10-osx, and build-clang-10-osx-no-stl. Each job should run on a specific OS (ubuntu-20.04 or macos-10.15), check out the code, and then build and run tests using clang with different configurations.
